fixes_applied.original_issue: Unprotected JSON.parse on _ai_memories.json — corrupted file crashes app on startup
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Wrapped JSON.parse in try-catch, logs warning and returns early on parse failure. Added createLogger import.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Unprotected JSON.parse on plugin settings row — corrupted settings crash PluginSettingsManager.load()
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Wrapped JSON.parse in try-catch, returns empty object on parse failure and logs warning via existing logger.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Triplicated message restoration logic (filter system, parse toolCalls JSON, build ChatMessage[]) across 3 files — divergence risk
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Extracted shared deserializeChatMessages() into new src/ai/message-utils.ts with safe JSON.parse for toolCalls. Replaced inline logic in all 3 consumers with calls to the shared helper. Also fixes the WARNING about toolCalls?: any type (now properly typed as ToolCall[]).

fixes_applied.original_issue: Infinite retry loop with no backoff or attempt limit for resolveBuiltinComponent
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Added MAX_RETRIES=10 limit and exponential backoff (1s, 2s, 4s... capped at 10s). Stops retrying after max attempts.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Event listener leak — addEventListener used but cleanup uses onchange = null
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Changed addEventListener('change', ...) to status.onchange = ..., matching the cleanup pattern (onchange = null).

fixes_applied.original_issue: ThemeManager registers system theme change listener but never removes it — prevents teardown in tests
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Stored handler as systemThemeHandler property. Added destroy() method that calls removeEventListener.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Unsafe type assertion (storageInfo as { mode: string }).mode bypasses type safety
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Changed to (storageInfo as Record<string, unknown>).mode which is a safer assertion pattern.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Explicit any type annotation for toolCalls in message restoration
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Eliminated by replacing inline restoration logic with deserializeChatMessages() which uses proper ToolCall[] type.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Settings load failure silently caught with no logging
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Added console.warn logging in catch block to indicate settings load failure.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Silent catch on settings load — user won't know if AI settings failed to load
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Added console.warn logging in catch block.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Silent catch on settings load — user won't know if AI settings failed to load
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Added console.warn logging in catch block.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Model fetch failure silently caught — no logging makes it hard to diagnose
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Added console.warn logging in catch block.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Session restore try/catch silently drops errors with only a comment
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Replaced empty catch with logger.warn('Session restore failed', { error: err }).

fixes_applied.original_issue: voice.speak() error silently swallowed
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Already fixed by round-1 audit — now uses console.warn.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Plugin instance accessed via as any to reach timeblocking store
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Deferred — requires defining a typed PluginWithStore interface and updating the plugin system's instance type, which is a larger refactor beyond a targeted fix.
fixes_applied.reason_if_deferred: Requires new interface definition and plugin system type changes — too broad for a targeted fix

fixes_applied.original_issue: Readable.fromWeb(res.body as any) uses as any cast
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Attempted ReadableStream<Uint8Array> but Node.js/Web ReadableStream type mismatch causes TS error. Reverted.
fixes_applied.reason_if_deferred: Node.js ReadableStream vs Web ReadableStream type incompatibility — requires @types/node version alignment or a wrapper function

fixes_applied.original_issue: Color value cast via as any for array.includes
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Already fixed by round-1 audit — now uses (DEFAULT_PROJECT_COLORS as readonly string[]).includes(color).

fixes_applied.original_issue: Stale TODO comment from early development
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Already removed by round-1 audit.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Web Speech API types not installed — 3 as any casts
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Deferred — requires installing @types/dom-speech-recognition or creating local type declarations.
fixes_applied.reason_if_deferred: Requires new dev dependency or type declaration file — beyond targeted fix scope

fixes_applied.original_issue: 4 as any casts for piper-tts library API
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Deferred — requires creating piper-tts.d.ts type declaration.
fixes_applied.reason_if_deferred: Requires new type declaration file for third-party library

fixes_applied.original_issue: ErrorBoundary only wraps main view area — Sidebar/AIChatPanel/TaskDetailPanel unprotected
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Deferred — requires wrapping multiple components in ErrorBoundary which needs testing of error states.
fixes_applied.reason_if_deferred: UI structural change requires careful testing of error boundary behavior in each panel

fixes_applied.original_issue: 4 eslint-disable directives for @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any in 55 lines
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Deferred — bridge module between plugin system and React needs careful typing of dynamic components.
fixes_applied.reason_if_deferred: Dynamic plugin component loading fundamentally needs flexible typing — requires broader plugin type system changes

fixes_applied.original_issue: Duplicated task extraction regex patterns maintained independently
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Deferred — extracting shared constants requires updating imports in both frontend and backend code paths.
fixes_applied.reason_if_deferred: Cross-boundary refactor (UI + AI tools) needs careful testing of both extraction paths

fixes_applied.original_issue: .swarm/ directory not gitignored
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Deferred — .swarm/ reports are intentionally committed per the audit workflow.
fixes_applied.reason_if_deferred: Intentional — swarm reports are tracked as part of the audit process

fixes_applied.original_issue: Three API calls with fallback to 0 — shows misleading data on failure
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Deferred — requires UI changes to show 'unavailable' state instead of numeric fallbacks.
fixes_applied.reason_if_deferred: UI state change requires new error state rendering — beyond targeted fix scope

pre_existing_failures: src/plugins/installer.ts — variable redeclaration errors from round-1 changes (not introduced by this round)
tests/plugins/settings.test.ts — error message mismatch ('Unknown setting' vs 'Setting not found') from round-1 NotFoundError refactor
src/ui/components/chat/useAIChatVoice.ts — pre-existing TS2339 isError property issue from round-1
summary: Fixed 14 issues (3 CRITICAL, 9 WARNING, 2 already fixed by round-1). Created src/ai/message-utils.ts as shared deserializeChatMessages() helper eliminating triplicated logic. Added try-catch guards around 2 unprotected JSON.parse calls. Added exponential backoff with retry limit to PluginView. Fixed event listener leak in MicrophoneSection. Added destroy() to ThemeManager. Added error logging to 6 silent catch blocks. 9 items deferred (type declaration files, structural UI changes, third-party library types). No new test failures or typecheck errors introduced.
